experience.organization: Autonomous AI & Decision Support Lab, National Centre for Physics
experience.summary: Leading projects on full-stack autonomous navigation, sim-to-real RL pipelines, SIL/HIL validation, and deployment on quadrupeds, manipulators, and ROS-based robots.
Ranked 3rd of 24 fellows in an advanced AI fellowship; trained in GANs, DRL, NLP, CV, Docker, Kubernetes, and edge AI.
Completed 50+ projects worldwide with 98% satisfaction, building deep learning and reinforcement learning systems, and simulation frameworks.
